_comment: Cleanup profiles for the Image Oasis prompt enhancer. Auto-resolved per request from the model filename; first match wins, no match falls back to 'universal'. Rule edits to existing profiles take effect on the next click; new profile entries also load on the next click (no restart needed since the enhancer no longer surfaces a profile picker).

qwen35-orphan-think.description: Qwen3.5 emits 'Thinking process: ... </think>' with no opening tag because the chat template prefilled <think>. Strip everything up to and including the orphan close.

qwen3-think-block.description: Qwen3 emits a full <think>...</think> block before the answer.

wizardlm-llama-tokens.description: WizardLM-2 leaks Llama-template tokens ([OUT], <<SYS>>, <</SYS>>) and prepends blank lines.

passthrough.description: Explicit no-op for known-clean models (SuperGemma, Mistral, Llama 3.3, Qwen2.5).
